metadata.description: Bricks — the open-source GTM engine. Replace Clay with open source and native integrations.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: The frozen contract: workspace scaffolding, SQLite schema, statuses vocabulary, db.py.

plugins.name: find
plugins.description: Find companies and contacts from open and native data sources.

plugins.name: find-crm-lookalike
plugins.description: Find companies similar to your best customers — CRM-agnostic (seeds via table, CSV or dictated list).

plugins.name: find-directory-scrape
plugins.description: Source companies from any online directory via Bright Data scraping (JS + anti-bot handled).

plugins.name: find-fullenrich
plugins.description: Source companies and contacts matching an ICP via FullEnrich search (MCP).

plugins.name: enrich-website
plugins.description: Visit each company's website and extract pitch, language and size hint.

plugins.name: enrich-email
plugins.description: Find verified professional emails via FullEnrich. Paid per contact, volume confirmed first.

plugins.name: write-sequence
plugins.description: Write a personalized 3-email sequence per contact. Drafts only — never sends.
